attacking_style: Does not initiate attacks; reactive rider who struggles to respond to late accelerations on short climbs and technical descents, particularly when rivals push pace.
team_tactics: Insufficient data on team support patterns; observations show abandonment of team duties when compromised, suggesting vulnerability when isolated.
terrain_preference: No clear terrain strength identified. Exposed on technical descents (crashed at 45mph, lost time hanging leg) and short punchy climbs where unable to respond to attacks.
vulnerability: Technical descending at high speeds causes crashes and time loss. Illness forces early abandons (2 documented cases). Cannot match accelerations on short climbs (5.9km) or respond when rivals attack late.
key_patterns: Technical descending weakness: crashed at 45mph, lost seconds hanging leg on separate descent (2 instances)
Illness-prone: abandoned due to gastroenteritis and illness in consecutive 2022 stage races (2 instances)
Reactive not proactive: locked up when attacked, no attacking observations recorded (2+ instances)
Short climb vulnerability: conceded time bonuses on 5.9km climb, unable to follow accelerations (2 instances)
form_trajectory: negative: consecutive illness-related abandons in 2022 (Catalunya, Giro) suggest chronic health/form issues compared to 2017 GC contention
